mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.division AS division, u.block_yn AS blockYn, b.block_reason AS blockReason, b.block_date AS blockDate, b.block_end_date AS blockEndDate, s.store_name AS storeName, s.create_date AS createDate, s.status AS status FROM users u
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, block_reason, block_date, block_end_date FROM ( SELECT b.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY b.user_id ORDER BY b.block_date DESC) rn FROM blacklist b ) WHERE rn = 1 ) b ON b.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, store_name, create_date, status FROM ( SELECT s.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY s.user_id ORDER BY s.create_date DESC) rn FROM store s WHERE TRIM(s.status) = '승인' ) WHERE rn = 1 ) s ON s.user_id = u.user_id
WHERE TRIM(u.division) != '관리자' AND ( (TRIM(u.division) != '점주') OR (TRIM(u.division) = '점주' AND s.user_id IS NOT NULL) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN TRIM(u.division) = '점주' THEN 0 WHEN TRIM(u.division) = '일반회원' THEN 1 ELSE 9 END, u.name, u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blacklist ( blacklist_id, user_id, block_reason, block_date, block_end_date ) VALUES ( blacklist_seq.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{blockReason}, SYSDATE, #{blockEndDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.division AS division, s.store_name AS storeName, s.create_date AS createDate, s.status AS status FROM users u JOIN store s ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE TRIM(s.status) = '승인대기' ORDER BY s.create_date DESC

SELECT notice_no AS noticeNo, notice_title AS noticeTitle, notice_content AS noticeContent, hit_count AS hitCount, top_yn AS topYn, create_date AS createDate, update_date AS updateDate, user_id AS userId FROM notice ORDER BY CASE WHEN top_yn = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, create_date DESC

SELECT qna_id AS qnaId, qna_title AS qnaTitle, qna_content AS qnaContent, answer_content AS answerContent, status_yn AS statusYn, secret_yn AS secretYn, create_date AS createDate, answer_date AS answerDate, user_id AS userId FROM qna WHERE answer_content IS NULL OR TRIM(answer_content) = '' ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT notice_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO notice ( notice_no, notice_title, notice_content, hit_count, create_date, update_date, user_id ) VALUES ( #{noticeNo}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, 0, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT bot_id AS botId, category_name AS categoryName, question_keyword AS questionKeyword, answer_content AS answerContent, active_yn AS activeYn, user_id AS userId FROM BOT ORDER BY bot_id DESC

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.name AS name, u.division AS division, u.block_yn AS blockYn,
b.block_reason AS blockReason, b.block_date AS blockDate, b.block_end_date AS blockEndDate FROM users u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, block_reason, block_date, block_end_date FROM ( SELECT b.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY b.user_id ORDER BY b.block_date DESC) rn FROM blacklist b ) WHERE rn = 1 ) b ON b.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
